phases.name: AI Provider Switch
phases.desc: Switch main generation engine from Claude to OpenRouter free

phases.name: Analytics Real Data
phases.desc: Wire analytics page to Supabase + Recharts

phases.name: Voice Profiles CRUD
phases.desc: Wire voice profiles to Supabase with create/edit/delete

phases.name: Settings Real Data
phases.desc: Wire settings tabs to Supabase profile/workspace data

phases.name: Scheduling Real Data
phases.desc: Wire scheduling calendar to Supabase generations

phases.name: Setup Connections
phases.desc: Platform OAuth flows for LinkedIn, X, Instagram etc

phases.name: API Access Keys
phases.desc: Real API key generation and webhook management

phases.name: Onboarding Save
phases.desc: Save onboarding wizard data to Supabase

broadcasts.message: MISSION: Build end-to-end functionality for Splintr app. All AI calls use OpenRouter free tier. All data wiring uses dual-mode pattern (mock localStorage + real Supabase). Follow existing content-store.ts pattern. Wave 1 starting: P0 (AI switch), P1 (Analytics), P2 (Voice CRUD), P7 (Onboarding save).
PLAN UPDATE: P0 and P7 already complete in codebase. Wave 1 adjusted to P1 (Analytics), P2 (Voice CRUD), P3 (Settings), P4 (Scheduling). All agents use dual-mode pattern from content-store.ts.
